introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Irvine, The Azizi Firm is here to help. Often ranked as one of America's safest cities, Irvine still sees its share of serious accidents on its major freeways and master-planned arterial roads. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our Irvine car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions on the I-5 and I-405, T-bone accidents at major intersections like Culver Drive and Walnut Avenue, head-on collisions, hit and run accidents, drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents, rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents in the Irvine Spectrum area, bicycle accidents on Irvine's extensive trail network, and accidents involving electric bikes and scooters near UC Irvine.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in Irvine
sections.body: Irvine's master-planned layout with wide arterials and high-speed limits creates specific risks. Common causes include speeding on wide open roads like Culver Drive and Jeffrey Road, distracted driving, failure to yield at complex multi-lane intersections, aggressive driving on I-5 and I-405, and accidents at the confusing I-5/I-405 interchange (the El Toro Y). The large student population near UC Irvine also contributes to distracted and inexperienced driver accidents. Our attorneys investigate every case thoroughly.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in Irvine?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention, document the scene with photos and videos, exchange information with other drivers, get witness contacts, file a report with Irvine PD, and contact a car accident lawyer before speaking with insurance companies. If an e-bike or scooter was involved, additional regulations may apply.

faq.question: How much is my Irvine car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs, lost wages (which may be significant given Irvine's high-income demographics), pain and suffering, and available insurance coverage. We offer free case evaluations.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We understand the high economic stakes for Irvine professionals and families and fight for compensation that reflects the true cost of recovery in Orange County.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Irvine, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
